## Summary

Brief description of the change.

## Changes

- List specific changes.
- Include any breaking changes.

## Testing

- [ ] Local CI gate passes (`./scripts/local-ci.sh`)
- [ ] Autogenerated tests pass for affected features/templates
- [ ] Scenario tests pass for affected features/templates
- [ ] Global smoke test passes (for cross-cutting changes)

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit message follows conventional commits
- [ ] README updated if options or behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
